## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between fwd.digital and Manifold](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-assisted content creation with human editors for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [Manifold needs high-quality, scientifically accurate content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Process can be customized for Manifold's specialized needs and quality requirements](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Next steps: fwd.digital to send sample SOW, Manifold to provide competitor/topic info](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)

## Topics

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI-powered research agents to gather context on client and industry](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Generates content ideas, outlines, and drafts using AI with human editor oversight](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Includes fact-checking, formatting, and quality control steps](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Can customize trusted sources and approval workflows for specialized fields](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Manifold's Content Needs

  - [Data management platform for multi-modal genomic data](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Requires high-quality, scientifically accurate content](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Challenges: limited internal resources for content creation, need for expert review](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Interested in both SEO-focused articles and potential for longer-form gated content](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### Quality Control and Expertise

  - [fwd.digital can adapt process for high-quality requirements:](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Use trusted source engine for credible information](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Implement human-in-the-loop approval for knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [Utilize fact-checkers with appropriate knowledge sources](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Add disclaimers and expert verification badges as needed](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

### Content Strategy Recommendations

  - [Start with aggressive, templatized approach to build foundational content](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [Focus on "anchor pieces" or cornerstone content to build upon](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Break larger concepts into smaller, related articles that can be repackaged](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [90-day pilot period in standard agreement](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Next available start date: February 10th](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [Flexible on discovery process, but prefers to move quickly to actual production](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send Slack connect invite for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [fwd.digital to share meeting recording and sample Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Manifold to provide list of competitors, desired content topics, and scientific partners](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion after Manifold team reviews information](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Explore potential February 10th start date if Manifold decides to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/32JfRmZbWrgac_4kGPsAYZtydxxqyTxL?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
